page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web application that discovers properties enriched in lists of genes or proteins that emerge from large-scale experimentation. The program takes a list of genes as input and produces a ranked list of the Gene Ontology terms enriched in an input list.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web application that discovers properties enriched in lists of genes or proteins that emerge from large-scale experimentation. The program takes a list of genes as input and produces a ranked list of the Gene Ontology terms enriched in an input list.
